justification.personality: Her established personality—gossipy, observant, and knowledgeable about wizarding history/scandals—is perfectly maintained in the film adaptation.
justification.narrative_role: Her role as the local, gossipy hub of information in the book (especially concerning the Black/Potter drama) is central to the film's depiction of the Leaky Cauldron/Diagon Alley area.
justification.motivations: Her primary motivations—gossip, maintaining business, and enjoying the drama—are fully preserved.
justification.character_arc: Since her role is largely static and informational across the books, her 'arc' is preserved by remaining the consistent, reliable source of local lore.

comparative.key_observations: Because the film adaptation heavily utilizes the established lore and character function of the book, the faithfulness score is maximal across all metrics.
